title: More Relics
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8a9d897cc48bdff084af9942293046dff51adcf7.png)



**Attention:** Relics 0.11 is a beta release and is not yet supported. Support will be available once it is fully released. For version 1.21.1, please use Relics 0.10.7.8 instead.

If you are running into the "data is null" crash after updating to morerelics-1.7.0, read the instructions in the 1.7.0 file changelog.

 
**More Relics** is an addon for the [Relics Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/relics-mod) which adds more, high quality Relics.



**Note:**

- This mod requires Relics and its dependencies ([Curios](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios), [Octo-Lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/octo-lib), [Architectury](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api)) to work!
- You can add this mod to your modpacks.

The mod currently adds **25+ high-quality relics**, some of which have a unique evolved forms. More relics will be added in future updates.



<details>
<summary>Relic Locations:</summary>

- **Axolotl Cream:**
  - **1.21.1:** Aquatic and Tropic (Chests in jungles, oceans, trial chambers, etc.)
  - **1.20.1:** Aquatic

- **Crown of the Legend:**
  - **Both:** Nether, Bastions

- **Eject Button:**
  - **1.21.1:** Everywhere with a low chance
  - **1.20.1:** End, Nether, Villages

- **Guts Orb:**
  - **1.21.1:** Bastions, Deserts, Ruined Portals
  - **1.20.1:** Bastions, Deserts, Nether

- **King Crimson:**
  - **Both:** Only obtainable by evolution (Tyrant Mask)

- **Tyrant Mask:**
  - **Both:** Bastions

- **Made in Heaven:**
  - **Both:** Only obtainable by evolution (Whispering Amulet)

- **Whispering Amulet:**
  - **Both:** Only obtainable by evolution (Slumbering Amulet)

- **Slumbering Amulet:**
  - **Both:** Buried Treasure

- **Mass Gauntlet:**
  - **1.21.1:** Everywhere with a low chance
  - **1.20.1:** End, Nether, Villages

- **Opal Necklace:**
  - **Both:** Deserts, Snow/Ice Biomes

- **Sentient Rust:**
  - **1.21.1:** Mineshafts, Mountains, Swamps
  - **1.20.1:** Mineshafts, Mountains, Stronghold

- **Shieldweave Cape:**
  - **1.21.1:** Caves, Taiga, Mountains, Anywhere in Overworld with low chance
  - **1.20.1:** Villages, Cold Biomes, Mineshafts, Stronghold

- **Bionic Eye:**
  - **Both:** Sculk (Ancient Cities, Deep Dark)

- **Thermoseismic Heart:**
  - **Both:** Desert

- **Biojoint:**
  - **1.21.1:** Nether, Mineshafts
  - **1.20.1:** Nether, Mineshafts, Stronghold

- **Whims of Fate:**
  - **Both:** Bastions, Desert

- **Depleted Spool:**
  - **1.21.1:** Caves, Mineshafts, Mountains
  - **1.20.1:** Pillager structures, Mineshafts, Stronghold

- **Weavers Spool:**
  - **Both:** Only obtainable by evolution (Depleted Spool)

- **Mood Worm:**
  - **1.21.1:** Everywhere (low chance)
  - **1.20.1:** End, Nether, Villages

- **VertebraX:**
  - **Both:** End

- **Gravitum Glove:**
  - **1.21.1:** End, Stronghold, Sculk
  - **1.20.1:** End, Sculk

- **Epoch Apple:**
  - **Both:** Dungeon chests

- **Converging Orb:**
  - **Both:** Woodland Mansions

- **Wonder of U:**
  - **Both:** Only obtainable by evolution (Converging Orb)

- **Gravitum Strider:**
  - **1.21.1:** End, Sculk
  - **1.20.1:** End, Sculk

 
- **Twing Fangs:**
  - **Both:** Pillager Outposts, Mansions


</details>


Translation Credits:

- Korean - **mochacat**
- Russian - **CTAPYXA**
